case_title: GUSTAVO MEJIA ET AL VS. GARRETT OCHSIE ET AL

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Continued To Aug-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Joel Chan, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Aug-06-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Joel Chan, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, and for good cause, the court ordered that the $400.00 sanction imposed on plaintiff's counsel for failure to appear at the Jan-15-2019 order to show cause hearing is set aside. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-07-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to MAR-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-15-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
